cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out why the author mentioned Zhang Wei's example. Let me read through the passage again to get a better understanding. The passage starts by talking about how writers used to go through publishers but now can post online and reach a large audience instantly. Bao Jingjing is an example of someone who started writing online after a breakup, her story became popular, turned into a best-seller and then a movie. The author points out that her story is one of many online novels leading to physical books, TV shows, and films. Then the passage moves on to Zhang Wei, also known
